articles.title: Binance CEO Richard Teng praises Trump’s crypto movement again, says he’s ‘fantastic’
articles.description: Binance CEO Richard Teng called President Trump’s second term a “fantastic reset” for crypto on Tuesday during a live CNBC interview. articles.title: Cardano Outshines Visa In Daily Transaction Capacity Through Hydra Protocol
articles.description: Cardano founder Charles Hoskinson recently noted that IOHK’s plan is to push the network to become a pillar of economic, political and social systems. However, such a goal would require a very high transaction throughput. Fortunately, that may not be a concern for the Cardano blockchain thanks to its Hydra protocol.

articles.title: Fidelity launches ‘OnChain’ Ethereum-tracked shares for Treasury money market fund
articles.description: Fidelity will maintain traditional book-entry records as the official ownership ledger, though the share transactions will also be recorded on Ethereum.

articles.title: Trump publicly endorses TRUMP coin on Truth Social, token jumps 10%
articles.description: President Donald Trump has voiced strong support for the Official Trump ($TRUMP) token. articles.title: ETH may reclaim $2.2K ‘macro range’ amid growing whale accumulation
articles.description: Ether needs to reclaim the “macro” range above the $2,200 mark to amass more upside momentum as crypto markets remain pressured by global macroeconomic concerns until at least the beginning of April. articles.title: Fidelity Joins Tokenized Asset Race with Ethereum-Based Treasury Fund
articles.description:
Fidelity Investments has filed to launch a blockchain-based share class of its money market fund on Ethereum, joining BlackRock and Franklin Templeton.

The post Fidelity Joins Tokenized Asset Race with Ethereum-Based Treasury Fund first appeared on Ecoinimist.

articles.title: XRP ETF Approval Date Nears
articles.description: The approval date for the XRP Exchange-Traded Fund (ETF) is rapidly approaching, signaling potential market developments and increased investor anticipation.

articles.title: Bitcoin needs weekly close above $85K to avoid correction to $76K: Analysts
articles.description: Bitcoin analysts are closely watching the weekly close to assess the cryptocurrency’s price trajectory for the coming week, as both traditional and crypto markets remain directionless amid a mix of global trade war fears and easing inflation concerns.
